subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 788833547/251231018 is not a GRB
body:
B. Hristov (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 788833547/251231018 at 00:25:42.73 UT
on 31 December 2025, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to a Solar flare."
